ideal_must_detect.matched_text: do not circulate beyond the insider list
Please redact bank account numbers, device serials, and session identifiers

Encik Firdaus Ilyas bin Mahzan (Chief Projects Officer, Saujana Lattice Berhad), DOB 12 March 1984 (age 42), office at HQ—Bandar Seri Angkasa, Negeri Damar, work email firdaus.mahzan@saujanalattice.com, staff ID SLB‑EMP‑0421, device SLB‑Laptop‑FA84 and Mahaphone‑X2 SN MPX2‑FA84‑6109, payroll at Nova Kelapa Bank Berhad a/c ending 7719

Further context for the same individual: VPN session SLB‑VPN‑26‑05‑29‑7842 connected 08:41–10:02 via internal IP 10.28.17.51, Teams invite ref SLB‑INV‑2026‑0530 (Meranti 3), and security door access log 4F‑317 at 08:39; these are PDPA‑relevant when combined

cross‑default trigger if EBITDA falls below RM60m

Under PDPA, personal data in employment and financing drafts must be minimised: names, emails, device IDs, session logs, payroll accounts, office locations, and DOBs can directly or indirectly identify a data subject.

The financing term sheet with Bintang Arteri Capital Sdn Bhd includes a maintenance covenant (Net Debt/EBITDA ≤ 2.5x) and a cross‑default trigger if EBITDA falls below RM60m; these terms are MNPI until the Exchange release.
